questions.question: What is the capital of Eldoria?
Who founded the Iron Accord and in what year?
Where does the Silver River flow from?
How long did Queen Elara III reign?
What does the Guild of Weavers control?
What is the tallest peak in Eldoria and its height?
What percentage of maritime trade does Saltmere handle?
When was the Thornhaven Academy established?
Where is Elderroot found?
What is the currency of Eldoria?
How large is the Deepwood?
How often does the festival of Twin Moons occur?
Who negotiated the Saltmere Treaty and in what year?
What is the Order of the Veil?
questions.expected: a secretive scholarly society based in Thornhaven

questions.question: When can Ironwood trees be harvested?
What was Thornhaven's population at the 2350 census?
How many volumes does the Thornhaven Academy library hold?
How far is the Silver River navigable from Saltmere upstream?
When was the Guild of Weavers founded?
How long did the Iron Accord maintain peace before dissolving?
What event preceded the founding of the Iron Accord?
questions.expected: The Sundering of 2089; Commander Vex united survivors afterward

questions.question: Why was Thornhaven built where it is?
questions.expected: It was built on the ruins of Old Mera

questions.question: What caused the Iron Accord's dissolution to lead to the Saltmere Treaty?
questions.expected: The dissolution (2201) left trade routes unsafe; the Saltmere Treaty (2215) addressed this

questions.question: How is Queen Elara III related to Commander Vex?
Why did the Guild of Weavers oppose the Saltmere Treaty?
questions.expected: It opened textile trade to foreign merchants, threatening their monopoly

questions.question: What is the connection between Ambassador Krell and the Thornhaven Academy?
questions.expected: Krell studied at the Thornhaven Academy before entering diplomacy

questions.question: Why does Elderroot only grow in certain locations?
questions.expected: It only grows where the Deepwood Veil was strongest before the Sundering

questions.question: Why did Saltmere's prosperity decline after 2201?
questions.expected: The Iron Accord dissolved, making trade routes unsafe

questions.question: What is the relationship between the Order of the Veil and Mount Verin?
questions.expected: Mount Verin was considered sacred by the Order of the Veil

questions.question: How did Queen Elara III address Saltmere's trade route problem?
questions.expected: She established the Silver River Patrol in 2330

questions.question: Which came first: the Guild of Weavers (1650) or the Thornhaven Academy (1892)?
How many years passed between the Sundering (2089) and the founding of the Iron Accord (2147)?
Did the Saltmere Treaty (2215) come before or after the Iron Accord dissolved (2201)?
Was Ambassador Krell alive when the Iron Accord was founded in 2147?
questions.expected: No — Krell negotiated the Saltmere Treaty in 2215, 68 years after the Accord was founded

questions.question: List these events in chronological order: Silver River Patrol (2330), Saltmere Treaty (2215), Queen Elara III's death (2356).
questions.expected: Saltmere Treaty (2215), Silver River Patrol (2330), Queen's death (2356)

questions.question: How many years did the Iron Accord last?
What happened in the 14 years between the Iron Accord dissolving (2201) and the Saltmere Treaty (2215)?
questions.expected: Saltmere's prosperity declined as trade routes became unsafe without the Accord's protection

questions.question: How many times had the festival of Twin Moons occurred by the year 2301?
questions.expected: The Order was founded in 2001; festival occurs every 17 years. By 2301: roughly 17-18 times.

questions.question: For how many years had the Guild of Weavers controlled textile trade as of the Saltmere Treaty (2215)?
Did the Thornhaven Academy (est. 1892) exist at the time of the Sundering (2089)?
questions.expected: Yes — it was founded 197 years before the Sundering
